violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Handles of the ice scoops are getting tossed into the ice bins with the handles down in the ice.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Particle board counters are starting to warp and separate leaving cracks exposed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Door going into the back store room the corners are cracking and sheet rock is coming apart.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Top beam above food prep area has dust buildup.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. 2 door upright cooler in BOH area running above 41 degrees F. Compressor iced over and unable to maintain adequate temperature.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Particle board cabinets/counters showing water swelling damage in FOH area.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Operate 3 tub as follows... 1) Hot soapy water 2) Clear water rinse 3) Sanitizing rinse 4) Air dry all utensils Ensure 2nd step is being accomplished prior to sanitizing rinse.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Store boxes and containers of items off floors in dry storage and BOH area to protect from possible contamination.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Hang fly strips away from areas where food service items & clean equipment is stored.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
